personas.name: Jordan
personas.voice: Quota-carrying. Owns 8-figure pipeline. Spends days in discovery calls, demos, and pricing negotiations. Frustrated by CRM hygiene work that takes time away from selling.

personas.name: Priya
personas.voice: Top of funnel. Cold outreach, qualification calls, meeting bookings. Lives in sequencer tools and LinkedIn. Optimizing for reply rates and conversion.

personas.name: Alex
personas.voice: Technical pre-sales. Demos, security reviews, RFPs, integration design. Bridges the gap between AEs and product. Often re-uses 80% of the same content per deal.

personas.name: Casey
personas.voice: Owns Salesforce, forecasting, comp plans. Runs weekly forecast calls. Frustrated by reps who don't update opportunities and managers who don't trust the data.

personas.name: Sam
personas.voice: Post-sale. Owns renewals, upsell, QBRs. Lives between customer Slack channels and account health dashboards. Wants earlier signal on at-risk accounts.

personas.name: Morgan
personas.voice: Forecasting, hiring, capacity planning, board reporting. Wants leverage from the team without hiring more bodies. Skeptical of new tools that promise the moon.
